items.title: Over 1,000 Kenyans enlisted to fight in Russia-Ukraine war, report says
items.description: Investigators call the recruitment a well-organised trafficking ring involving immigration staff and security agencies.

items.title: Eight skiers found dead after California avalanche
items.description: Fifteen skiers went missing on Tuesday following a massive avalanche in California's Lake Tahoe region. One person remains missing but is presumed dea...

items.title: Desperate hunt for breakthrough in Nancy Guthrie case turns to Mexico
items.description: The search for the 84-year-old mother of US presenter Savannah Guthrie has moved into a third week.

items.title: Woman accused of using ChatGPT to plan drug murders
items.description: The 21-year-old woman is accused by authorities in South Korea of secretly administering drinks containing drugs to three men in their 20s.

items.title: Suspected carbon-monoxide leak kills at least 30 miners in Nigeria, witnesses say
items.description: The workers are believed to have collapsed after the gas built up in poorly ventilated tunnels.
